TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu sraral sraral.... balay ga kmayal mha squliq ga. tnaq kwara squ sinhluyan, nanu yasa, khmay khmay balay qu squliq hoyaw alay qu squliq lga rrgyax qani ga, ini tnaq son ki'an khmayun son squliq la. nanu yasa bnkis kmayal mha ahi hmswa leqay ta qmasuy smka, smka ga musa squ kyahu rgyax bb'nux nanu mha sqani qu pkkayal. tehuk squ ryax nasa. t'aring squ qmasuw squ sihluyan, yaqu smoya musa squ leheci bbnux squ qyanux squliq ga musa psqun squ lebinah nqu rrgyax. nanu yasa, cingay na squliq ga nanu pksyugun na sazing nqu sinhluyan ru musa ta spwah squ phngiyang nqu hngiyang ga musa ta baqun mha sazing sinhluyan qani ga musa tnaq squ khmay na squliq. nanu yasa bnkis kmayal mha, aw baq t'rang qmasuw Tayal ga cinngay balay squliq wal nha qingun, ini hmwaw, skura bbnux na mrhuw smyuk mha nway la nway la. ini ga babaw nya maki squ rngu mamu ga uwah qmalup squ kmop tunux myan. uwah squ mgaga sminan. kmayal lga nanu wal squ mma nqu rhiyal mqyanux la. aring nasa lga rgyax nqu sinlhuyan na squliq ga skayal nha squ hugal nqu bbnux nqu ssquliq ga Skhmayun son nha. imi na qani ga khmay balay na squliq. t'rang babaw nasa lga aring squ rgyax nqu sinhluyan ga ini phngaw mwah qmalup ini ga mwah mgaga squ yaw qani la. nanu saya sazing sinhluyan squ hmwah mha oy~~~ binah nqu rrgyax cqun squ phngiyang, nanu pongan squ musa bebnux na squliq ga sihluyan na squliq ga cipuq hazi hngiyang nha nanu yasa aring squ ssobih rrgyax nqu sinluyan na squ squliq ga musa tmwang kya nanu yasa cqun lmhwaw lozi ga trang squ rmhaw qani lga pongan nha a~ tnaq qu hngyang nanu yasa mha sqani squ kmayal bnkis mha blaq. sazing nqu sinhluyan na Tayal ga, maha sqani psgayan trang squ shriq rgyax musa squ b'bnux na sinhluyan squliq ga, trang qani lga, cqun squ mhow hngiyang nha hopa si bbu squ kayal tgtuw kwara rgyax ru hlahuy. nanu maki squ rrgyax na sinhluyan na squliq nkux mhaw, sa balay cingay squliq mamu.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu s~ɕraral s~ɕraral.... βalaj ɣa kmajal mħa s~ɕquliq ɣa. tnaq kwara s~ɕqu s~ɕinħlujan, nanu jas~ɕa, kħmaj kħmaj βalaj qu s~ɕquliq ħojaw alaj qu s~ɕquliq lɣa rrɣjax qani ɣa, ini tnaq s~ɕon kiʔan kħmajun s~ɕon s~ɕquliq la. nanu jas~ɕa βnkis~ɕ kmajal mħa aħi ħms~ɕwa leqaj ta qmas~ɕuj s~ɕmka, s~ɕmka ɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕqu kjaħu rɣjax ββʔnux nanu mħa s~ɕqani qu pkkajal. teħuk s~ɕqu rjax nas~ɕa. tʔariŋ s~ɕqu qmas~ɕuw s~ɕqu s~ɕiħlujan, jaqu s~ɕmoja mus~ɕa s~ɕqu leħeʦ~ʨi ββnux s~ɕqu qjanux s~ɕquliq ɣa mus~ɕa ps~ɕqun s~ɕqu leβinaħ nqu rrɣjax. nanu jas~ɕa, ʦ~ʨiŋaj na s~ɕquliq ɣa nanu pks~ɕjuɣun na s~ɕaziŋ nqu s~ɕinħlujan ru mus~ɕa ta s~ɕpwaħ s~ɕqu pħŋijaŋ nqu ħŋijaŋ ɣa mus~ɕa ta βaqun mħa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕinħlujan qani ɣa mus~ɕa tnaq s~ɕqu kħmaj na s~ɕquliq. nanu jas~ɕa βnkis~ɕ kmajal mħa, aw βaq tʔraŋ qmas~ɕuw tajal ɣa ʦ~ʨinŋaj βalaj s~ɕquliq wal nħa qiŋun, ini ħmwaw, s~ɕkura ββnux na mrħuw s~ɕmjuk mħa nwaj la nwaj la. ini ɣa βaβaw nja maki s~ɕqu rŋu mamu ɣa uwaħ qmalup s~ɕqu kmop tunux mjan. uwaħ s~ɕqu mɣaɣa s~ɕminan. kmajal lɣa nanu wal s~ɕqu mma nqu rħijal mqjanux la. ariŋ nas~ɕa lɣa rɣjax nqu s~ɕinlħujan na s~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕkajal nħa s~ɕqu ħuɣal nqu ββnux nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕkħmajun s~ɕon nħa. imi na qani ɣa kħmaj βalaj na s~ɕquliq. tʔraŋ βaβaw nas~ɕa lɣa ariŋ s~ɕqu rɣjax nqu s~ɕinħlujan ɣa ini pħŋaw mwaħ qmalup ini ɣa mwaħ mɣaɣa s~ɕqu jaw qani la. nanu s~ɕaja s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕinħlujan s~ɕqu ħmwaħ mħa oj~~~ βinaħ nqu rrɣjax ʦ~ʨqun s~ɕqu pħŋijaŋ, nanu poŋan s~ɕqu mus~ɕa βeβnux na s~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕiħlujan na s~ɕquliq ɣa ʦ~ʨipuq ħazi ħŋijaŋ nħa nanu jas~ɕa ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕs~ɕoβiħ rrɣjax nqu s~ɕinlujan na s~ɕqu s~ɕquliq ɣa mus~ɕa tmwaŋ kja nanu jas~ɕa ʦ~ʨqun lmħwaw lozi ɣa traŋ s~ɕqu rmħaw qani lɣa poŋan nħa a~ tnaq qu ħŋjaŋ nanu jas~ɕa mħa s~ɕqani s~ɕqu kmajal βnkis~ɕ mħa βlaq. s~ɕaziŋ nqu s~ɕinħlujan na tajal ɣa, maħa s~ɕqani ps~ɕɣajan traŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕħriq rɣjax mus~ɕa s~ɕqu βʔβnux na s~ɕinħlujan s~ɕquliq ɣa, traŋ qani lɣa, ʦ~ʨqun s~ɕqu mħow ħŋijaŋ nħa ħopa s~ɕi ββu s~ɕqu kajal tɣtuw kwara rɣjax ru ħlaħuj. nanu maki s~ɕqu rrɣjax na s~ɕinħlujan na s~ɕquliq nkux mħaw, s~ɕa βalaj ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquliq mamu.
S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu sraral sraral.... balay ga kmayal mha squliq ga. tnaq kwara squ sinhluyan, nanu yasa, khmay khmay balay qu squliq hoyaw alay qu squliq lga rrgyax qani ga, ini tnaq son ki'an khmayun son squliq la. nanu yasa bnkis kmayal mha ahi hmswa leqay ta qmasuy smka, smka ga musa squ kyahu rgyax bb'nux nanu mha sqani qu pkkayal. tehuk squ ryax nasa. t'aring squ qmasuw squ sihluyan, yaqu smoya musa squ leheci bbnux squ qyanux squliq ga musa psqun squ lebinah nqu rrgyax. nanu yasa, cingay na squliq ga nanu pksyugun na sazing nqu sinhluyan ru musa ta spwah squ phngiyang nqu hngiyang ga musa ta baqun mha sazing sinhluyan qani ga musa tnaq squ khmay na squliq. nanu yasa bnkis kmayal mha, aw baq t'rang qmasuw Tayal ga cinngay balay squliq wal nha qingun, ini hmwaw, skura bbnux na mrhuw smyuk mha nway la nway la. ini ga babaw nya maki squ rngu mamu ga uwah qmalup squ kmop tunux myan. uwah squ mgaga sminan. kmayal lga nanu wal squ mma nqu rhiyal mqyanux la. aring nasa lga rgyax nqu sinlhuyan na squliq ga skayal nha squ hugal nqu bbnux nqu ssquliq ga Skhmayun son nha. imi na qani ga khmay balay na squliq. t'rang babaw nasa lga aring squ rgyax nqu sinhluyan ga ini phngaw mwah qmalup ini ga mwah mgaga squ yaw qani la. nanu saya sazing sinhluyan squ hmwah mha oy~~~ binah nqu rrgyax cqun squ phngiyang, nanu pongan squ musa bebnux na squliq ga sihluyan na squliq ga cipuq hazi hngiyang nha nanu yasa aring squ ssobih rrgyax nqu sinluyan na squ squliq ga musa tmwang kya nanu yasa cqun lmhwaw lozi ga trang squ rmhaw qani lga pongan nha a~ tnaq qu hngyang nanu yasa mha sqani squ kmayal bnkis mha blaq. sazing nqu sinhluyan na Tayal ga, maha sqani psgayan trang squ shriq rgyax musa squ b'bnux na sinhluyan squliq ga, trang qani lga, cqun squ mhow hngiyang nha hopa si bbu squ kayal tgtuw kwara rgyax ru hlahuy. nanu maki squ rrgyax na sinhluyan na squliq nkux mhaw, sa balay cingay squliq mamu.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu s~ɕraral s~ɕraral.... βalaj ɣa kmajal mħa s~ɕquliq ɣa. tnaq kwara s~ɕqu s~ɕinħlujan, nanu jas~ɕa, kħmaj kħmaj βalaj qu s~ɕquliq ħojaw alaj qu s~ɕquliq lɣa rrɣjax qani ɣa, ini tnaq s~ɕon kiʔan kħmajun s~ɕon s~ɕquliq la. nanu jas~ɕa βnkis~ɕ kmajal mħa aħi ħms~ɕwa leqaj ta qmas~ɕuj s~ɕmka, s~ɕmka ɣa mus~ɕa s~ɕqu kjaħu rɣjax ββʔnux nanu mħa s~ɕqani qu pkkajal. teħuk s~ɕqu rjax nas~ɕa. tʔariŋ s~ɕqu qmas~ɕuw s~ɕqu s~ɕiħlujan, jaqu s~ɕmoja mus~ɕa s~ɕqu leħeʦ~ʨi ββnux s~ɕqu qjanux s~ɕquliq ɣa mus~ɕa ps~ɕqun s~ɕqu leβinaħ nqu rrɣjax. nanu jas~ɕa, ʦ~ʨiŋaj na s~ɕquliq ɣa nanu pks~ɕjuɣun na s~ɕaziŋ nqu s~ɕinħlujan ru mus~ɕa ta s~ɕpwaħ s~ɕqu pħŋijaŋ nqu ħŋijaŋ ɣa mus~ɕa ta βaqun mħa s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕinħlujan qani ɣa mus~ɕa tnaq s~ɕqu kħmaj na s~ɕquliq. nanu jas~ɕa βnkis~ɕ kmajal mħa, aw βaq tʔraŋ qmas~ɕuw tajal ɣa ʦ~ʨinŋaj βalaj s~ɕquliq wal nħa qiŋun, ini ħmwaw, s~ɕkura ββnux na mrħuw s~ɕmjuk mħa nwaj la nwaj la. ini ɣa βaβaw nja maki s~ɕqu rŋu mamu ɣa uwaħ qmalup s~ɕqu kmop tunux mjan. uwaħ s~ɕqu mɣaɣa s~ɕminan. kmajal lɣa nanu wal s~ɕqu mma nqu rħijal mqjanux la. ariŋ nas~ɕa lɣa rɣjax nqu s~ɕinlħujan na s~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕkajal nħa s~ɕqu ħuɣal nqu ββnux nqu s~ɕs~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕkħmajun s~ɕon nħa. imi na qani ɣa kħmaj βalaj na s~ɕquliq. tʔraŋ βaβaw nas~ɕa lɣa ariŋ s~ɕqu rɣjax nqu s~ɕinħlujan ɣa ini pħŋaw mwaħ qmalup ini ɣa mwaħ mɣaɣa s~ɕqu jaw qani la. nanu s~ɕaja s~ɕaziŋ s~ɕinħlujan s~ɕqu ħmwaħ mħa oj~~~ βinaħ nqu rrɣjax ʦ~ʨqun s~ɕqu pħŋijaŋ, nanu poŋan s~ɕqu mus~ɕa βeβnux na s~ɕquliq ɣa s~ɕiħlujan na s~ɕquliq ɣa ʦ~ʨipuq ħazi ħŋijaŋ nħa nanu jas~ɕa ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕs~ɕoβiħ rrɣjax nqu s~ɕinlujan na s~ɕqu s~ɕquliq ɣa mus~ɕa tmwaŋ kja nanu jas~ɕa ʦ~ʨqun lmħwaw lozi ɣa traŋ s~ɕqu rmħaw qani lɣa poŋan nħa a~ tnaq qu ħŋjaŋ nanu jas~ɕa mħa s~ɕqani s~ɕqu kmajal βnkis~ɕ mħa βlaq. s~ɕaziŋ nqu s~ɕinħlujan na tajal ɣa, maħa s~ɕqani ps~ɕɣajan traŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕħriq rɣjax mus~ɕa s~ɕqu βʔβnux na s~ɕinħlujan s~ɕquliq ɣa, traŋ qani lɣa, ʦ~ʨqun s~ɕqu mħow ħŋijaŋ nħa ħopa s~ɕi ββu s~ɕqu kajal tɣtuw kwara rɣjax ru ħlaħuj. nanu maki s~ɕqu rrɣjax na s~ɕinħlujan na s~ɕquliq nkux mħaw, s~ɕa βalaj ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquliq mamu.
